header.title: Notes from the Glasswing Optics standup

gold.name: Glasswing Optics
claims: Glasswing Optics closed a Series B of $22 million in April 2026.
Glasswing Optics plans to move into the larger Fremont facility in 2027.
Glasswing Optics built its first prototype in 2019.
Glasswing Optics' first prototype is going to the company museum case.

gold.name: Tessellate Ventures
claims: Tessellate Ventures will lead Glasswing Optics' bridge round if one is needed.

gold.name: Mira Chen
claims: Mira Chen is a founder of Glasswing Optics.

gold.name: Dev Ratner
claims: Dev Ratner works in finance at Glasswing Optics.
